title: FPS HUD
description: A simple, lightweight HUD mod that shows your current FPS in-game.
body:
# 📗 About
SmoothFPS is a lightweight Fabric mod that displays your current FPS in-game. It’s designed to be simple, unobtrusive, and fast, helping you monitor your Minecraft performance effortlessly.

Compatible with all Minecraft versions that support Fabric, giving you real-time FPS feedback no matter your setup.

# ⚙️ Settings Menu
Customize the display position, colors, and toggle features on or off with the built-in settings menu.

# 🐸 Compatibility

Quilt: This mod is primarily developed for Fabric, but it may work on Quilt. Some issues could occur.

NeoForge: Currently not supported. Some users may try Sinytra Connector as a workaround, but no official support is provided.

# 🐞 Bugs and Issues
Found a bug or problem? Please report it on the GitHub Issue Tracker.

Want to contribute? Pull requests for new features, improvements, or translations are welcome!
